name: Tokai Soft Co., Ltd.
summary: Tokai Soft Co., Ltd. provides factory automation and embedded software development and network infrastructure technology services. It offers artificial intelligence system, mission-critical system, production system, and automotive software development; IOT/M2M and mobile solutions; image processing; motor control, measurement, monitoring, and logistics; and embedded and visualization platform. The company also provides infrastructure construction services; Flex signal, an operation monitoring Web system; Flex Device, a cloud virtual system; business card management solution that electronically convert business cards; Knowledge solution, a business knowledge management tool; and PENTAS, a middleware. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
